name: Shrimp and Vegetable Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. At least 2 hours ahead, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Carefully drop in the shrimp and cook until just tender, about 1 minute. Drain, rinse under cold water, drain again, and place in a large serving bowl.
2. Add the peppers, tomatoes, dill, tarragon, shallots, red pepper flakes, black pepper, salt, lemon juice, olive oil, and chili oil to the serving bowl. Toss well with the shrimp.
3. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. When you are ready to serve, bring a large pan of water to a boil. Drop in the broccoli and cook for 1 minute. Drain and rinse under cold water, drain again.
5. Toss the peas and broccoli with the shrimp and vegetables.
6. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the remaining olive oil and linguine. Cook at a rolling boil until just tender. Drain the linguine and immediately toss with the shrimp and vegetable sauce.
7. Serve at once. Serves 6.
